articles.title: West Bengal Assembly Elections 2026 | West Bengal set to step into saffron era with Suvendu Adhikari's swearing-in as CM on Saturday
articles.description: West Bengal BJP: Suvendu Adhikari will take oath as the state's first BJP chief minister at Kolkata's Brigade Parade Ground today. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Amit Shah are expected at the ceremony marking a major political shift in Bengal.

articles.title: S Gurumurthy Flags Rookie Mistake By Vijay's TVK That Led To Tamil Nadu High Drama
articles.description: Gurumurthy said that amid the high drama, political parties are "haggling" and "bargaining".

articles.title: Row over ‘harassment’ of Indore businessman: 2 cops suspended for negligence
articles.description: Stricter action may not have been taken as complainant sought 'leniency' for the police personnel

articles.title: Journey from Nandigram to writers’ buildings: The political journey of Suvendu Adhikari
articles.description: West Bengal witnesses a historic political transition as BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari is set to be sworn in as the state's first BJP Chief Minister. Adhikari, a prominent figure who defected from TMC, secured a landslide victory for the BJP, ending 15 years of Trinamool Congress rule.

articles.title: When Is Apara Ekadashi 2026? Know Tithi, Shubh Muhurat And Other Important Details
articles.description: Apara Ekadashi, which falls each year during the Krishna Paksha of the month of Jyeshtha, is considered a special occasion for worshipping Lord Vishnu.

articles.title: Allahabad High Court refuses protection to interfaith couple: Why being a ‘child’ at 19 blocks live-in rights?
articles.description: Allahabad High Court was hearing an interfaith couple's plea seeking police protection during their live-in relationship.

articles.title: Bengal celebrates as Suvendu Adhikari to be sworn in as first BJP CM
articles.description: Folk artists and performers celebrate as Suvendu Adhikari is set to be sworn in as West Bengal's first BJP Chief Minister. The BJP secured a historic victory with 207 seats in the 2026 Assembly elections, paving the way for the new government.

articles.title: Moneycontrol Pro Weekender | Fog-proof
articles.description: Markets are hostage to tweets and missiles, but Corporate India is finding ways to navigate through the fog

articles.title: Punjab won't bow to pressure: CM Mann on ED raids against minister
articles.description: Punjab CM Bhagwant Mann accused the BJP of misusing the ED after a third raid on minister Sanjeev Arora. Stating Punjab wouldn't bow to pressure, he was joined by AAP's Sanjay Singh who called the ED the BJP's 'supari killer'.

articles.title: Rabindra Jayanti: PM Modi hails Tagore as timeless voice of India
articles.description: PM Modi paid tribute to Rabindranath Tagore on Pochishe Boishakh, calling him a timeless voice. The day also marks the BJP forming its first government in West Bengal, with Suvendu Adhikari set to be sworn in as the Chief Minister.

articles.title: Iran HITS BACK As US Super Hornets Strike Supertankers; IRGC Engages Navy Destroyers
articles.description: The "fragile ceasefire" in the Gulf has collapsed into open warfare. In a massive escalation, the U.S. military has begun launching airstrikes against supertankers attempting to bypass the naval blockade on Iran. CENTCOM confirms that over 70 vessels—capable of carrying 166 million barrels of oil—have been halted, with two VLCCs already disabled at sea. With the IRGC confirming direct naval combat against U.S. ships, the Strait of Hormuz is no longer a trade route; it is a front line.

articles.title: Best of BS Opinion: India's jobs market faces a starkly different future
articles.description: From India's changing employment landscape and Mamata Banerjee's political decline to Muslim marginalisation and the IPL's future, here are the top opinion picks

articles.title: SAD to contest civic body polls on party symbol
articles.description: The meeting also authorised all halka in-charges to appoint block-level agents (BLOs) to assist in the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) exercise in the state.

articles.title: BJP’s 1st, Bengal’s 9th: Suvendu to take oath as CM today in PM Modi-Amit Shah presence
articles.description: Suvendu Adhikari has been unanimously elected BJP legislative party leader and will be Bengal's next chief minister. Union Home Minister Amit Shah made the announcement, highlighting Adhikari's fighting spirit and administrative experience. The swearing-in ceremony is scheduled for Saturday, with Prime Minister Narendra Modi in attendance.

articles.title: Trump says Iran response to US peace proposal expected ‘tonight’ amid push to end war
articles.description: US President Donald Trump said he expects Iran’s response to Washington’s latest proposal to end the Middle East conflict by Friday night. Speaking outside the White House, Trump told reporters he was “getting a letter supposedly tonight,” adding that the US would “see how that goes” as diplomatic efforts continue amid heightened regional tensions.

articles.title: Kolkata Police unfollows Mamata Banerjee, Abhishek Banerjee on X; follows PM Narendra Modi, Amit Shah after BJP win
articles.description: Kolkata Police's official X handle has shifted its following to prominent BJP leaders like PM Modi and Amit Shah, unfollowing Mamata Banerjee and Abhishek Banerjee. This digital change follows the BJP's assembly election victory and coincides with the withdrawal of additional security from TMC offices and residences.

articles.title: US sanctions 10 firms accused of aiding Iran’s weapons and drone supply network
articles.description: US Treasury Department has sanctioned 10 individuals and companies, including entities in China and Hong Kong, over allegations that they helped Iran’s military procure weapons and raw materials for its Shahed drone and missile programmes.

articles.title: Suvendu's Bengal CM Oath-Taking Today, Political Stars Line Up
articles.description: Suvendu Adhikari, a former confidant of Mamata Banerjee, is set to take oath as West Bengal's next Chief Minister after BJP's significant victory in the 2026 elections.

articles.title: LJK backs Rangaswamy for Puducherry CM, swearing-in on May 13
articles.description: LJK Party founder Jose Charles Martin announced support for N Rangaswamy as Puducherry CM, confirming the swearing-in ceremony for May 13. The NDA ally's support solidifies Rangaswamy's claim after he met the Lt. Governor to form the government.

articles.title: India reaffirms Vision MAHASAGAR at 10th Indian Ocean Dialogue
articles.description: India reiterated its commitment to a peaceful, stable, and prosperous Indian Ocean region during the 10th Indian Ocean Dialogue in New Delhi, highlighting its Vision MAHASAGAR and upcoming IORA Chairship for 2025-27.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM announcement: Governor cannot question majority stitched post-poll
articles.description: Supreme Court rulings consistently state governors must invite the largest party or alliance to form government post-election, without questioning how support was gained. The apex court has warned against dismissing governments or dissolving assemblies based on 'fanciful assumptions' of horse-trading, emphasizing that majority must be proven on the floor of the House.

articles.title: How drama in Tamil Nadu unfolded, the several plots, offers of friendship & a 'betrayal'
articles.description: Following TVK's electoral success, AIADMK factions engaged in backroom dealings to form a government, with one group attempting to ally with TVK while the party's general secretary sought a tie-up with DMK. These maneuvers ultimately failed as Left parties opted to support TVK, thwarting the Dravidian majors' plans.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Ronald Reagan: ‘There is no greater happiness for a man than approaching a door at the end of a day knowing...’ - What many marriages today need most, explained by former US President
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Ronald Reagan suggests that true happiness in marriage often comes from emotional comfort, companionship, and knowing someone is waiting for you at the end of the day. The former US President’s timeless words continue to resonate with couples navigating modern relationships and people finding a cure for loneliness.

articles.title: New Video Shows US Warships Fighting With Iran Speedboats In Hormuz | WATCH
articles.description: CENTCOM has released footage of US warships engaging with Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) fast-attack boats in the Strait of Hormuz, demonstrating heightened tensions in this crucial maritime area.

articles.title: Tehran could withstand blockade for four months, CIA report shows, as fighting flares
articles.description: A US intelligence analysis said Iran could withstand a naval blockade for months and had not been forced to capitulate despite US strikes.

articles.title: 'Beginning of the end of war?’: Trump announces 3-Day 'surprise' Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire
articles.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Friday announced on social media that there would be a three-day ceasefire in the war ​between Russia and Ukraine from May 9 until May 11 to mark ‌the end of World War Two for the Russians. Trump had said after a phone call with Putin on April 29 that a temporary ceasefire was in the ​works. Putin announced a similar truce last year that lasted three ​days but was not agreed with Kyiv.

articles.title: Nancy Guthrie Latest Update: Is Pima County Sheriff Chris Nanos Getting Fired Over The Case?
articles.description: Officials in Arizona are seeking to remove Pima County Sheriff Chris Nanos over allegations he lied under oath about past disciplinary actions during his policing career in El Paso. The effort comes as Nanos also faces criticism over the handling of the Nancy Guthrie disappearance investigation.

articles.title: Ayşegül Eraslan, Turkish fashion influencer, reportedly faced blackmail involving sexually explicit photos before her death, family lawyer makes shocking revelations
articles.description: Turkish influencer Ayşegül Eraslan was found dead in her home. Her family lawyer claims she faced blackmail and threats before her death. Police are investigating the incident. Eraslan gained fame on a fashion show and had a large social media following. Mobile phones and notes from her home are being examined by forensic teams.

articles.title: Trump says Russia, Ukraine agree to his request for three-day ceasefire, prisoner swap
articles.description: Trump announces a three-day ceasefire and prisoner swap agreement between Russia and Ukraine, signaling potential peace progress.

articles.title: Element of surprise key to secure strategic edge, Rajnath tells commanders
articles.description: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh emphasized that future wars will hinge on innovative thinking and synergy, not just weaponry. He urged commanders to prioritize artificial intelligence, autonomous systems, and secure communications, stressing the need to anticipate enemy surprises and stay ahead. Singh highlighted hybrid threats and multi-domain operations, commending the forces' jointness and technological adoption.

articles.title: "Centre's Intervention May Be Needed": Top Court On Drugs Menace In Punjab
articles.description: The bench also pulled up state police for focusing on low-level offenders for "publicity".

articles.title: FIITJEE case: HC directs ED to remove press release with ‘judgmental aspersions’
articles.description: FIITJEE case: HC directs ED to remove press release with ‘judgmental aspersions’

articles.title: Ibobi slams Centre, state over Kamjong violence
articles.description: In a passionate address, Okram Ibobi Singh, the president of the Manipur Congress, has pointed fingers at both the Central and state BJP administrations for the rising tide of violence in Kamjong, which has resulted in the destruction of over 20 homes.

articles.title: HC awaits consent from lawyers to become amici
articles.description: Delhi HC awaits senior lawyers’ consent to act as amici for Kejriwal, Sisodia and Pathak in CBI liquor policy discharge plea; hearing deferred to May 11.

articles.description: 60k households in 12 districts complete self-enumeration in 1 week

articles.title: Dr Manik Saha, Assam CM Hail West Bengal Political Shift
articles.description: Tripura Chief Minister Dr Manik Saha and Assam Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma hailed the political shift in West Bengal and congratulated BJP CM in Bengal Suvendu Adhikari. Agartala/Guwahati: The formation of the BJP government in West Bengal received strong backing from key BJP leaders in the Northeast on Friday. Tripura Chief Minister Manik Saha [...] The post Dr Manik Saha, Assam CM Hail West Bengal Political Shift appeared first on ENewsTime .

articles.title: Vijay set to become Tamil Nadu CM as TVK claims support of 121 MLAs
articles.description: Actor-turned-politician Vijay is set to become Tamil Nadu chief minister after TVK claimed support of 121 MLAs amid intense political negotiations

articles.title: No, betrayal is never normal
articles.description: Human history has always carried the stains of betrayal. The wound hurts differently because it comes not from an enemy, but from someone once trusted enough to stand close. The greater danger is when betrayal ceases to shock people’s conscience, as it happens during elections. What did Valluvar write about betrayal by allies? Listen in.

articles.title: From Dilip Ghosh’s Proposal To Amit Shah’s Announcement: How Suvendu Adhikari Was Chosen As Bengal CM
articles.description: Suvendu Adhikari quickly emerged as the frontrunner because of his central role in the BJP’s rise in Bengal and his influence across key districts.

articles.title: 'Enough is enough': Supreme Court raps MP government over delay in granting sanction to prosecute Minister for remarks against Col Sofiya
articles.description: Supreme Court: The apex court criticised the Madhya Pradesh government over delay in granting sanction to prosecute minister Vijay Shah for remarks against Col Sofiya Qureshi, calling the comments “most unfortunate” during Friday’s hearing.

articles.title: VCK Puts Price On Support To Vijay – And It Starts With Deputy CM Post
articles.description: The Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi (VCK) is demanding key positions and legislative changes from Thalapathy Vijay's TVK in exchange for support in forming Tamil Nadu's government.

articles.title: Quote of the day for kids by Martin Luther King Jr: "If you can’t fly then run, if you can’t run then walk if you can’t walk then crawl, but whatever you do you..."
articles.description: Civil Rights icon Martin Luther King Jr.'s enduring message of perseverance is highlighted, particularly for children. His famous quote, "If you can’t fly then run... keep moving forward," teaches that progress, not speed, is key. This philosophy encourages patience, resilience, and a positive mindset, vital for navigating life's challenges and fostering confidence in young minds.

articles.title: CPI to Extend Outside Support to Vijay, Won't Join TVK Govt: Reports
articles.description: TVK Vijay is actively navigating Tamil Nadu's political landscape to secure a majority for forming the next government.

articles.title: Viral MLA Preference List Shows KC Venugopal Claiming Majority Support As Kerala CM
articles.description: Mukul Wasnik sparked controversy after a viral photograph allegedly showed a document listing MLA preferences for Kerala’s next Chief Minister. The markings appeared to indicate strong support for K. C. Venugopal, whose camp reportedly claims backing from 46 Congress MLAs. Senior leaders Ramesh Chennithala and V. D. Satheesan reportedly trail in support. Amid the growing row, Congress leaders said the final decision on Kerala’s Chief Minister would be taken by the party high command. Watch

articles.title: B.Y. Raghavendra offers invitation to Eshwarappa
articles.description: B.Y. Raghavendra invites former Minister K.S. Eshwarappa to the upcoming BSY Abhimanotsava in Chitradurga.

articles.title: Kash Patel orders lie detector tests for FBI staff to identify alleged leaks behind negative stories of his leadership: Report
